goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:45' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'leicester' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:45 and should leave on sunday
The train should go to leicester and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
